verses.text: A lian mahmah Theofilas aw:—- Eite lakah a piang ngeisa thu a kigente, mi tampi in amau siamna zahciat tawh lai-in a gelh uh hi
A kipat cila kipanin amau' mit mahmah tawh a mu mite in hong gente uh a gelh uh ahi hi
Kei zong, hih thute khempeuh a kipat cila kipanin limtakin kantel khin ka hih manin, a thu a kizomzomin nang-a' dingin hong gelhsak leng hoih ding hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi
Nang tungah a hong kigensa thute khempeuh a man taktak na theihna ding deihsakna tawh ka hong gelh ahi hi.

Judea gam a hong uksawn kumpi Herod hun laitakin siampi Abijah' pawlte' sung panin Zekhariah minnei siampi khat a om hi. A zi' min Elizabeth hi a, amah zong Aaron' suan ahih manin siampi nam mah ahi hi
A nih tuakun Pasian' muhna-ah a manin gamta uh a, Topa' thukhamte leh a ngeina khempeuh a zui uh hi
Ahi zongin Elizabeth ciing ahih manin amau nupa in ta neilo uh a, a nih tuakun zong a teekta uh ahi hi
Nikhat, ama pawlte' sep hunding a tun' ciangin Zekhariah in Pasian' mai-ah siampi nasep a sem hi
Siampite' hih ngeizel bangin biakna tau tungah, paknamtui kua in hal ding, ci-in ai a kisan ciangin Zekhariah in a ngah hi. Tua ahih manin Topa' biakinn sungah amah lut a
amah in paknamtui halin a om laitakin mihonpi dangte a pualamah thungenin na om uh hi
Tua laitakin Topa' vantung mi khat ama kiangah hong kilang a, paknamtui a kihalna biakna tau taklam pangah a ding hi
Zekhariah in vantung mi a muh ciangin lamdangsa mahmah a, a lau mahmah hi
Ahi zongin vantung mi in ama kiangah, “Zekhariah aw, lau kei in. Pasian in na thungetna hong zakhin a, na zi Elizabeth in tapa khat a nei ding hi. A min dingin Johan na phuak ding hi
Amah hong suah ciangin nang na lungdam mahmah ding a, midang tampite in zong hong lungdampih ding uh hi
Topa' muhna-ah amah milian khat hi ding hi. Amah in leenggahzu ahi a, khamtheihzu khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin nelo ding hi. A suah pheta kipanin Kha Siangtho tawh kidim ding hi
Amah in Israel mi tampi tak, amau' Topa Pasian' kiangah tun'pihkik ding hi

Amah pen kamsang Elijah mah bangin thahatna leh vangliatna tawh Pasian mai-ah hong mapai ding hi. Pate leh tate kilemsak kikin, mihoihte' lungsim bang a neihna dingun thumanglo mite' lungsim heisak ding a, Topa-a' dingin a kilawm dingin mite a bawlkhol ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Zekhariah in vantung mi kiangah, “Hih na thugen a manna bangci theih ding ka hi hiam? Kei ka teekta a, ka zi zong lah a teek mahmah ahi hi,” a cih ciangin
vantung mi in dawng a, “Kei pen Pasian' na a sem Gabriel ka hi hi. Nang kiangah thu hong genin, hih lungdamna thu a ko dingin a hong sawl ka hi hi
Ahi zongin, a hong tungding ka thugen a hun lai-in umlo na hih manin nangma tunga kong thugen a tun' matengin pau theiloin na om ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua hun sungteng, mihonte in Zekhariah na ngak uh a, biakinn sungah sauveipi a om manin lamdang a sa uh hi
Amah hong pusuah ciangin pau theilo ahih manin, biakinn sungah maang mu hi, ci-in a thei uh hi. Pau theilo ahih manin a khut tawh a lim a lak hi
Biakinn sungah ama nasep ding hun a bei ciangin a inn-ah a ciah hi
Tua khit ciangin a zi Elizabeth gai a, kha nga sung inn panin koimahah a paikhia kei hi
“Tu petpetin Topa in hih bangin kei hong huh a, mi lakah ka maizumna teng hong paihkhiatsak ta hi,” a ci hi.
Elizabeth a gaizawh kha guk a cin' ciangin Pasian in Galilee gam Nazareth khua-ah vantung mi Gabriel a paisak hi
Kumpi David' suan Josef in zuthawl a piaksa Mary tungah thu a gen dingin a sawl ahi hi
Vantung mi in Mary kiangah, “Na lungdam mahmah ding ahi hi. Topa in nang hong ompih a, thupha lianpi hong piazo hi,” a ci hi
Mary in vantung mi' thugen a zak ciangin, bang a cihnopna hi ding ahi hiam, ci-in lamdang a sa mahmah hi
Tua ciangin vantung mi in, “Mary aw, lamdangsa-in lunghimawh kei in. Pasian' maipha a ngah na hi hi
Nang gai-in tapa khat na nei ding a, a min dingin Jesuh na phuak ding hi
Amah milian hi ding a, A Lianpen Pasian' Tapa kici ding hi. Topa Pasian in ama pu David mah bangin kumpi-in bawl ding a
Jakob suanlekhakte' kumpi hi paisuak ding a, ama ukna bei hun cih om ngeilo ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Mary in vantung mi kiangah, “Kei, pasal tawh a lumkhawm ngei nailopi, hih thu bangci pian'theih ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Vantung mi in, “Nangma tungah Kha Siangtho hong tung ding a, nangma tungah Pasian' vangliatna hong om ding hi. Tua ahih manin a hong suakding a siangtho naungek pen Pasian' Tapa kici ding hi
Na behnu Elizabeth zong thei in. A ciing hi, kici napi-in a teek mahmah zawh nungin nau paii a, tu-in a naupaii zawh kha guk pha ta hi
Tua ahih manin Pasian in a bawl theihloh khat zong omlo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Mary in, “Kei pen Topa' nasemnu ka hi hi. Na gensa bangin keima tungah hong piang ta hen,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin ama kiang panin vantung mi a paikhia hi.
Tua khit a sawtloin Mary kithawi a, Judea mualtung gama khua khatah a va paipah hi
Zekhariah' inn-ah lutin Elizabeth a hopih hi
Elizabeth in Mary' hopihna awging a zak ciangin a sunga a naupaii a hong diang hi. Elizabeth zong Kha Siangtho tawh hong kidim a
nakpi takin kiko-in, “Numei khempeuh lakah thupha ngahpennu na hi a, na neih ding naungek in thupha ngah ding hi
Ka Topa' nu kei kiangah hong hawhna dingin, bang hangin hih bang thu lian kei tungah hong tung ahi hiam
Bang hang hiam cih leh nong hopihna awging ka zak phetin ka sunga naungek nuamin a diang hi
Topa in nang tungah a hong gen thute hong tung taktak ding hi, ci-a upna pen nang-a' dingin a lungdamhuai mahmah ahi hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Mary in, “Ka lungsim in Topa phat a
hong Hon Pasian' hangin ka nuam mahmah hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a neu mahmah a nasemnu, keimah a hong phawk hi. Tu-a kipanin a khangkhangin mi khempeuh in thupha ngahnu hong ci ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Pasian in keima-a' dingin na lianpi hong sepsak hi. Ama min siangtho a
amah a zahtak mite tungah a khangkhangin hehpihna a lak hi
Amah in a hat mahmah a khut zan a, kiliatsakna lungsim a nei mite a thehthang hi
Kumpi vangliante, a tokhom panun khiasuk a, mineute, milianin a bawl hi
Bangmah a neilote tungah na manpha tampi pia a, mihaute, khuthawm guakin a paikhiasak hi
I pu i pate tungah a kiciamna tungsak a, a nasempa Israel a huh hi
Abraham leh a suanlekhak khempeuh tungah hehpihna a piak tawntung ding a phawk hi,” a ci hi
Elizabeth kiangah kha thum sung bang Mary taam a, tua khit ciangin a inn-ah a ciah hi.
Elizabeth a suahding hun hong tungta a, tapa khat hong nei hi
Topa in amah a hehpih mahmahna thu a zak uh ciangin a vengte leh a behte khempeuh in a lungdampih uh hi
Naungek nipikal khat a phak khit ciangin a vun a at dingin hong pai uh a, a naungek' min dingin zong a pa' min mah ahi Zekhariah phuahding a sawm uh hi
Ahi zongin a nu in, “Hilo ding hi; ama min dingin Johan i phuak ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute in Elizabeth kiangah, “Na beh sung uhah hih bang min a nei om nailo hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin hih nau min bang phuakding ihi hiam, ci-in a pa kiangah lim tawh a dong uh hi
Zekhariah in zong laidal khat ngen a, tua tungah, “Ama min Johan hi ding hi,” ci-in a gelh ciangin amaute khempeuh in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi
Tua laitakin Zekhariah hong pauthei kik a, Pasian a phat hi
A vengte khempeuh in lamdangsa-in lau uh a, Judea mualtung gamsung khempeuhah hih thu a kitheithang hi
Hih thu a za mi khempeuh in, “Hih naungek a bangci mi hong hi ding hiam?” ci-in a lungsim sung uhah a ngaihsun ciat uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amah a huhna thu teltakin kilang hi.
Tua ciangin Johan' pa Zekhariah, Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin Pasian' thu gen a
“Israel mite' Topa Pasian phat ciat ni. A mite a huhdingin hong pai-in amaute a suaktasak hi
A nasempa David' suante sung panin eite-a' dingin Vanglian Honpa hong pia hi
Amah in tanglai-in a kamsang mi siangthote tung tawnin thu hong gen a
i galte kiang panin hong hotkhiatna ding leh hong mudahte' khutsung panin hong hotkhiatna ding thu a hong ciam hi
I pu i pate a hehpihna ding leh ama thuciam siangtho hong mangngilh lohna ding, amah in hong gen hi
I pu Abraham tungah kamciamna kho khat bawl a
i galte kiang panin eite hong hotkhiatna ding leh launa omloin amah bia-in
i khang tawnin ama mai-ah a siangtho, a thumanin i om tawntung theihna ding thu hong ciam hi
“Nang, ka tapa na hi a, Lianpen Pasian' kamsangpa hong kici ding hi. Ama paina ding lampi a bawlkhol dingin Topa' mai-ah na mapai ding hi
Na mawhna uh hong kimaisak khit ciangin, hotkhiatna na ngah ding uh hi, ci-in ama mite kiangah na gen ding hi
I Pasian lungnem mahmah a, hehpihna hong nei hi. Eite tungah hotkhiatna khuavak hong taangsak ding a
sihding lauhuaina sungah a om mi khempeuh tungah vantung khuavak hong taangsak ding a, nopsakna lampi-ah hong kha ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua naungek a pumpi leh a lungsim siamna hong khang a, Israel mite lakah a kilaak hun matengin sehnel gamsungah a om hi.
